# Rajath Rao — Senior Software Engineer

> Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years building scalable cloud systems in Python and AWS. Currently Senior Software Engineer at Intropic (London); previously Vice President, Software Engineer at Goldman Sachs. Specialises in Python, AWS, FastAPI, microservices, and GenAI/LLM integration.

## Profile
- Name: Rajath Rao
- Title: Senior Software Engineer
- Location: London, UK
- Email: rajathn8@gmail.com
- Website: https://rajathn8.github.io/

## Current & past roles
- Senior Software Engineer — Intropic, London (current)
- Vice President, Software Engineer — Goldman Sachs, London

## Core skills
Python, AWS, FastAPI, Django, Microservices, Cloud Architecture, GenAI, LLM Integration, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, PostgreSQL, Aurora.

## Certifications
- AWS Solutions Architect Associate
- HashiCorp Terraform Associate
- Databricks GenAI Fundamentals
